title: T&E SOFT 3D Golf Simulation Series Dokuhon (1993/04/30)
summary: This is a Special Appendix that came with the 1993-04-30 issue of Japanese magazine Theスーパーファミコン (The Super Famicom) This guide book shows tips for all 18 holes on each the four T&E SOFT golf games available on SNES: Harukanaru Augusta Pebble Beach no Hatou Waialae no Kiseki Devil’s Course These courses were also featured in games on other platforms so the…
content:
This is a Special Appendix that came with the 1993-04-30 issue of Japanese magazine Theスーパーファミコン (The Super Famicom)

This guide book shows tips for all 18 holes on each the four T&E SOFT golf games available on SNES:

  • Harukanaru Augusta
  • Pebble Beach no Hatou
  • Waialae no Kiseki
  • Devil’s Course

These courses were also featured in games on other platforms so the guide has much broader usefulness.
